AssertionError: 
1. Body field 'responseCode' value mismatch. Expected = [201] Actual = [400] 
2. Body field 'message' value mismatch. Expected = [User created!] Actual = [Email already exists!]
[API] Create user should return 200_OK when send create user request with valid data. Case: 'zipcode' length = max
parameters: User(id=<built-in function id>, self.email='pwhite@arrnel.io', self.first_name='Linda', self.last_name='Turner')
